capabilities_used.evidence: 2026-02-24: "4 year cyclers are ignoring the fact that Bitcoin has always bottomed 23 months after its previous ATH. We are now at 23 months"；配图 2 直接用历史周期做横向对比，标注 "21 Bars / 23 Bars / 23 Bars?"。

2024-04-20: "#Bitcoin has halved. This year will be one thing… BIG"；2024-03-25: "Less than one month until the #Bitcoin halving... Statistically the most exciting, wealth-generating part of the cycle is beginning."
2024-09-26: "Once we get a few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC, it’s over. We’re going so much higher."；2024-09-26: "That’s a higher high for Bitcoin"；他明显用突破+高高点确认上升趋势。

2024-03-27: "the most successful in history" 讨论 BlackRock BTC ETF；2024-01-30: "BLACKROCK ACCUMULATED OVER 50,000 #BITCOIN LAST WEEK"；2024-12-16: "Remember last cycle when billions of dollars of Bitcoin were bought every day by ETF’s? Oh shit nevermind this is the first cycle..."
2024-08-13: "Crypto has been basically just ranging sideways for 6 months"；2024-08-21: "I can’t watch Bitcoin go sideways for another 6 months"；说明他会把市场先归类为长时间震荡，再等待方向选择。
2024-08-23: "Go ahead Powell make me rich"；2024-08-23: "Jerome is about to cut rates"；他把降息/流动性宽松当作风险资产上行催化。
2025-07-21: "Altszn is coming"；2025-07-21: "I buy altcoins to make gains to convert into Bitcoin"；2025-08-24: "Ethereum is exploding Soon all altcoins will pump big."
虽然很少明确报均线数值，但他经常用收复关键区间/站上关键水平来判断趋势切换，例如 2024-09-26 的 "few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC"，本质是关键位收复确认而不是抄底。
2024-03-26: "$100k #btc is going to come fast once we clear this range"；他的图文表达反复强调横盘箱体上沿被突破后将加速，虽未严格画三角，但属于典型上沿突破思路。
他表面上爱喊抄底，但真正表达更偏向等确认后加仓：2024-09-26 强调 "few daily closes, a weekly above $65k"；不是纯左侧接刀，而是等结构确认后重仓看多。
配图 4 用大红箭头演绎熊派的崩盘预期，配图 3 则在对数长周期图上给出继续抛物上行路径；说明他熟悉抛物线叙事，但通常把它当成牛市延续而非顶部警报。
没有系统展开，但多次把宏观风险偏好与加密方向绑定，如 Powell、利率、ETF 资金流等，属于轻量级风险偏好框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: ATH/Range High Weekly Close Confirmation
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 前高/区间上沿周线收盘确认
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Wait for multiple daily closes and preferably a weekly close above a major range high or prior ATH before treating the breakout as a high-conviction expansion leg.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 等待关键区间上沿或前高被多根日线、最好周线有效收于上方，再将其视为高胜率主升浪启动，而不是仅凭瞬时刺破追单。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-26: "Once we get a few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC, it’s over."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Despair Contrarian Bottom
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 情绪绝望反向底部信号
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use extreme doom, panic posting, and broad retail despair on the timeline as a contrarian input that the local low or shakeout is near completion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把社媒上的恐慌、绝望、看空刷屏作为反向指标，认为洗盘接近尾声、底部正在形成。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-12-20: "The sentiment over the last few days because of this Bitcoin and Crypto dip is honestly pretty telling..."；2025-02-25 多条推文嘲讽 "top is in, it’s over" 言论。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Memetic Momentum Amplification
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Blend simple breakout or cycle observations with emotionally loaded, repeated bullish slogans to reinforce high-conviction positioning and audience alignment during trend expansion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把简单的突破/周期判断与高强度口号、梗图、夸张措辞结合，在趋势上行阶段持续强化看多共识与持仓信心。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 反复出现 "something BIG is coming"、"Higher"、"Banana Zone"、"However big you think it's gonna be - It will be bigger."

personal_quirks.quote: However big you think it's gonna be - It will be bigger. Bitcoin
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认不要低估 BTC 牛市的幅度，趋势一旦成立就用更高的终局目标看待。

personal_quirks.quote: Once we get a few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC, it’s over. We’re going so much higher.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键位突破需要收盘确认；确认后不犹豫，按趋势扩张处理。

personal_quirks.quote: 4 year cyclers are ignoring the fact that Bitcoin has always bottomed 23 months after its previous ATH. We are now at 23 months
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他用自己偏好的周期锚点替代简单的四年周期模板，强调历史节奏复现。

personal_quirks.quote: The sentiment over the last few days because of this Bitcoin and Crypto dip is honestly pretty telling...
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 时间线上的绝望与放弃，是他判断洗盘接近完成的重要反向线索。

personal_quirks.quote: Do not chase gains. Do not swap into something that’s pumping because yours hasn’t yet
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 牛市里也不鼓励情绪化追涨换仓，强调拿住已有仓位等待轮动。

unique_traits: 他不像传统严谨 TA 交易员那样依赖复杂指标，而是把周期、关键位突破、ETF/宏观催化和社媒情绪反向信号压缩成极少数高传播度结论。图表框架本身并不复杂，真正突出的地方是把“结构上看多”包装成持续输出的高亢叙事。整体更像强牛市阶段的高贝塔趋势布道者，而不是双向中性执行型交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: However bullish you are, it’s not enough
It’s over. We’re going so much higher
Bitcoin is about to do something VERY big
low_conviction_phrases: Call me crazy but I think we are gonna go up again
idk why but I have this nagging feeling
